hibernate-mapping.sql-query: INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_PATIENTS ( MRN, Facility, NAME, NAME_LAST, NAME_FIRST, SSN, SEX, EPN, dob, VIP, LOCKOUT) VALUES( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients ( ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_Patients_Seq, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq ) VALUES (?, (SELECT MAX(patient.ROI_Patients_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients patient WHERE patient.MRN = ? AND patient.Facility = ?), ?, ?, ?, ?);

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore ( ROI_RequestCore_Seq, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq ) VALUES (?, (SELECT MAX(patient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore patient WHERE patient.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq = ?), ?, ?, ?, ?);

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_ENCOUNTERS ( ROI_Patients_Seq, MRN, ENCOUNTER, FACILITY, ADMITTED, DISCHARGED, LOCKOUT, SERVICE, VIP, HAS_DEFICIENCY, PT_TYPE) VALUES ( (SELECT MAX(pat.ROI_Patients_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE pat.MRN = ? AND pat.FACILITY = ? AND pat.ROI_Patients_Seq = core.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = ?),
?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);
INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_ENCOUNTERS ( ROI_Patients_Seq, MRN, ENCOUNTER, FACILITY, ADMITTED, DISCHARGED, LOCKOUT, SERVICE, VIP, HAS_DEFICIENCY, PT_TYPE) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS ( ROI_Encounters_Seq, ROI_Patients_Seq, ENCOUNTER, MRN, FACILITY, DOC_NAME, SUBTITLE, DOC_ID, DOCTYPE_ID, CHART_ORDER, DATETIME) VALUES ( (SELECT MAX(enc.ROI_Encounters_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_ENCOUNTERS enc, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE enc.FACILITY = ? AND enc.ENCOUNTER = ? AND enc.ROI_Patients_Seq = core.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = ?), (SELECT MAX(pat.ROI_Patients_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE pat.MRN = ? AND pat.FACILITY = ? AND pat.ROI_Patients_Seq = core.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = ?),
?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS ( ROI_Encounters_Seq, ROI_Patients_Seq, ENCOUNTER, MRN, FACILITY, DOC_NAME, SUBTITLE, DOC_ID, DOCTYPE_ID, CHART_ORDER, DATETIME) VALUES ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS ( ROI_Patients_Seq, ENCOUNTER, MRN, FACILITY, DOC_NAME, SUBTITLE, DOC_ID, DOCTYPE_ID, CHART_ORDER, DATETIME) VALUES ( (SELECT MAX(pat.ROI_Patients_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE pat.MRN = ? AND pat.FACILITY = ? AND pat.ROI_Patients_Seq = core.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = ?),
?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS ( ROI_Patients_Seq, ENCOUNTER, MRN, FACILITY, DOC_NAME, SUBTITLE, DOC_ID, DOCTYPE_ID, CHART_ORDER, DATETIME) VALUES ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_VERSIONS ( ROI_Documents_Seq, VersionNumber, Doc_Id) VALUES ( (SELECT MAX(doc.ROI_Documents_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS doc, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE doc.DOC_ID = ? AND doc.ROI_Patients_Seq = core.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = ?),
?, ?)

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_VERSIONS ( ROI_Documents_Seq, VersionNumber, Doc_Id)
VALUES ( ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_VERSIONS ( ROI_Documents_Seq, VersionNumber, Doc_Id) VALUES ( (SELECT MAX(doc.ROI_Documents_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS doc, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE doc.DOC_ID = ? AND doc.ROI_Patients_Seq = core.ROI_Patients_Seq AND doc.ROI_Encounters_Seq is null AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = ?),
?, ?)

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_PAGES ( ROI_Versions_Seq, imnet, page, contentcount, SelectedForRelease, IsReleased, PageNumberRequested) VALUES ( (SELECT MAX(ver.ROI_Versions_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_VERSIONS ver, cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS doc, cabinet..ROI_ENCOUNTERS enc, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE ver.ROI_Documents_Seq = doc.ROI_Documents_Seq AND ver.VersionNumber = ? AND ver.Doc_Id = ? AND doc.ROI_Encounters_Seq = enc.ROI_Encounters_Seq AND enc.ROI_Patients_Seq = core.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = ?),
?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_PAGES ( ROI_Versions_Seq, imnet, page, contentcount, SelectedForRelease, IsReleased, PageNumberRequested) VALUES ( (SELECT MAX(ver.ROI_Versions_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_VERSIONS ver, cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS doc, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE ver.ROI_Documents_Seq = doc.ROI_Documents_Seq AND ver.VersionNumber = ? AND ver.Doc_Id = ? AND doc.ROI_Patients_Seq = core.ROI_Patients_Seq AND doc.ROI_Encounters_Seq is null AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = ?),
?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_PAGES ( ROI_Versions_Seq, imnet, page, contentcount, SelectedForRelease, IsReleased, PageNumberRequested) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore ( MRN, FACILITY, ROI_Patients_Seq, ROI_SupplementarityDocuments_Seq, ROI_BillingTier_Seq, DOCNAME, ENCOUNTER, DOCFACILITY, DEPARTMENT, SUBTITLE, PAGECOUNT, DATEOFSERVICE, COMMENT, SelectedForRelease, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq) VALUES ( ?, ?, (SELECT MAX(pat.ROI_Patients_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE pat.MRN = ? AND pat.FACILITY = ? AND pat.ROI_Patients_Seq = core.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = ?),
?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore ( MRN, FACILITY, ROI_Patients_Seq, ROI_SupplementarityDocuments_Seq, ROI_BillingTier_Seq, DOCNAME, ENCOUNTER, DOCFACILITY, DEPARTMENT, SUBTITLE, PAGECOUNT, DATEOFSERVICE, COMMENT, SelectedForRelease, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore SET SelectedForRelease = ?, ROI_BillingTier_Seq = ?, Modified_Dt = ?, Modified_By_Seq = ? WHERE ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore_Seq = ?

UPDATE cabinet..ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore SET ROI_BillingTier_Seq = ?, DOCNAME = ?, ENCOUNTER = ?, DEPARTMENT = ?, SUBTITLE = ?, PAGECOUNT = ?, DATEOFSERVICE = ?, COMMENT = ?, SelectedForRelease = ?, Modified_Dt = ?, Modified_By_Seq = ? WHERE ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore_Seq = ?

UPDATE cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore SET SelectedForRelease = ?, ROI_BillingTier_Seq = ?, Modified_Dt = ?, Modified_By_Seq = ?, Document_Source = ? WHERE ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore_Seq = ?

UPDATE cabinet..ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore SET ROI_BillingTier_Seq = ?, TYPE = ?, ENCOUNTER = ?, DOCFACILITY = ?, SUBTITLE = ?, PAGECOUNT = ?, ISDELETED = ?, DATEOFSERVICE = ?, ATTACHMENTDATE = ?, UUID = ?, FILENAME = ?, VOLUME = ?, PATH = ?, FILETYPE = ?, FILEEXT = ?, printable_flag = ?, SUBMITTEDBY = ?, COMMENT = ?, SelectedForRelease = ?, isreleased = ?, Modified_Dt = ?, Modified_By_Seq = ?, Document_Source = ? WHERE ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore_Seq = ?

insert into ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore ( MRN, FACILITY, ROI_Patients_Seq, ROI_SupplementarityAttachments_Seq, ROI_BillingTier_Seq, TYPE, ENCOUNTER, DOCFACILITY, SUBTITLE, PAGECOUNT, ISDELETED, DATEOFSERVICE, ATTACHMENTDATE, UUID, FILENAME, VOLUME, PATH, FILETYPE, FILEEXT, printable_flag, SUBMITTEDBY, COMMENT, SelectedForRelease, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Document_Source) VALUES ( ?, ?, (SELECT MAX(pat.ROI_Patients_Seq) FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients core WHERE pat.MRN = ? AND pat.FACILITY = ? AND pat.ROI_Patients_Seq = core.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = ?),
?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT into cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore ( MRN, FACILITY, ROI_Patients_Seq, ROI_SupplementarityAttachments_Seq, ROI_BillingTier_Seq, TYPE, ENCOUNTER, DOCFACILITY, SUBTITLE, PAGECOUNT, ISDELETED, DATEOFSERVICE, ATTACHMENTDATE, UUID, FILENAME, VOLUME, PATH, FILETYPE, FILEEXT, printable_flag, SUBMITTEDBY, COMMENT, SelectedForRelease, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Document_Source) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore ( ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq, ROI_SupplementalDocuments_Seq, ROI_BillingTier_Seq, DOCNAME, ENCOUNTER, DEPARTMENT, SUBTITLE, PAGECOUNT, DATEOFSERVICE, COMMENT, SelectedForRelease, DOCFACILITY, FACILITY, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq) VALUES ( (SELECT MAX(patient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq) FROM ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore patient, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore core WHERE patient.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq = ? AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = ? AND patient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq), ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore ( ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq, ROI_SupplementalDocuments_Seq, ROI_BillingTier_Seq, DOCNAME, ENCOUNTER, DEPARTMENT, SUBTITLE, PAGECOUNT, DATEOFSERVICE, COMMENT, SelectedForRelease, DOCFACILITY, FACILITY, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);

insert into ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore ( ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq, ROI_SupplementalAttachments_Seq, ROI_BillingTier_Seq, TYPE, ENCOUNTER, DOCFACILITY, FACILITY, SUBTITLE, PAGECOUNT, ISDELETED, DATEOFSERVICE, ATTACHMENTDATE, UUID, FILENAME, VOLUME, PATH, FILETYPE, FILEEXT, printable_flag, SUBMITTEDBY, COMMENT, SelectedForRelease, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Document_Source) VALUES ( (SELECT MAX(patient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq) FROM ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore patient, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore core WHERE patient.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq = ? AND core.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = ? AND patient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq),
?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

INSERT INTO ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore ( ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq, ROI_SupplementalAttachments_Seq, ROI_BillingTier_Seq, TYPE, ENCOUNTER, DOCFACILITY, FACILITY, SUBTITLE, PAGECOUNT, ISDELETED, DATEOFSERVICE, ATTACHMENTDATE, UUID, FILENAME, VOLUME, PATH, FILETYPE, FILEEXT, printable_flag, SUBMITTEDBY, COMMENT, SelectedForRelease, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Document_Source) VALUES ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

(SELECT coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, patient.ROI_Patients_Seq patientSeq, 0 supplementalId, RTRIM(patient.MRN) mrn, RTRIM(patient.Facility) facility, null freeformFacility, RTRIM(patient.NAME) name, RTRIM(patient.NAME_LAST) lastName, RTRIM(patient.NAME_FIRST) firstName, RTRIM(patient.dob) dob, RTRIM(patient.SEX) gender,
RTRIM(patient.SSN) ssn, RTRIM(patient.EPN) epn, coalesce(RTRIM(patient.VIP), 0) vip, coalesce(patient.LOCKOUT, 0) patientLocked, 0 encounterLocked, 1 hpf,
null createdDt, 0 createdBy, null modifiedDt, 0 modifiedBy
FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients patient, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPatient WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and patient.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq) UNION
(SELECT coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, supp.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq patientSeq, supp.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq supplementalId, supp.MRN mrn, supp.Facility facility, supp.FreeFormFacility freeformFacility, (case when supp.LASTNAME IS NULL then '' else supp.LASTNAME end + case when supp.FIRSTNAME = '' then '' when supp.FIRSTNAME IS NULL then '' else ', ' + supp.FIRSTNAME end) name, RTRIM(supp.LASTNAME) lastName, RTRIM(supp.FIRSTNAME) firstName, supp.dob dob, supp.GENDER gender,
supp.SSN ssn, supp.EPN epn, coalesce(supp.VIP, 0) vip, coalesce(supp.patientLocked, 0) patientLocked, coalesce(supp.encounterLocked, 0) encounterLocked, 0 hpf,
supp.Created_Dt createdDt, supp.Created_By_Seq createdBy, supp.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, supp.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy
FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore supp, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore coreToPatient WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId AND supp.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq)

SELECT coalesce(encounters.ROI_Encounters_Seq, 0) encounterSeq, coalesce(encounters.ROI_Patients_Seq, 0) patientSeq, RTRIM(encounters.ENCOUNTER) name, RTRIM(encounters.FACILITY) facility, RTRIM(encounters.MRN) mrn, RTRIM(encounters.PT_TYPE) patientType, RTRIM(encounters.SERVICE) patientService, coalesce(encounters.LOCKOUT, 0) locked, coalesce(encounters.VIP, 0) vip, encounters.ADMITTED admitdate, encounters.DISCHARGED dischargeDate, coalesce(encounters.HAS_DEFICIENCY, 0) hasDeficiency
FROM cabinet..ROI_ENCOUNTERS encounters, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPatient WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestid and encounters.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq

SELECT documents.ROI_Documents_Seq documentSeq, coalesce(documents.ROI_Encounters_Seq, 0) encounterSeq, coalesce(documents.ROI_Patients_Seq, 0) patientSeq,
RTRIM(documents.DOC_NAME) name, RTRIM(documents.SUBTITLE) subtitle, RTRIM(documents.DOC_ID) docId, RTRIM(documents.DOCTYPE_ID) docTypeId, RTRIM(documents.CHART_ORDER) chartOrder, documents.DATETIME dateTime, RTRIM(documents.MRN) mrn, RTRIM(documents.ENCOUNTER) encounter, RTRIM(documents.FACILITY) facility
FROM cabinet..ROI_ENCOUNTERS encounters, cabinet..ROI_Documents documents, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPatient WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestid and encounters.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq and documents.ROI_Encounters_Seq = encounters.ROI_Encounters_Seq

SELECT documents.ROI_Documents_Seq documentSeq, coalesce(documents.ROI_Encounters_Seq, 0) encounterSeq, coalesce(documents.ROI_Patients_Seq, 0) patientSeq,
RTRIM(documents.DOC_NAME) name, RTRIM(documents.SUBTITLE) subtitle, RTRIM(documents.DOC_ID) docId, RTRIM(documents.DOCTYPE_ID) docTypeId, RTRIM(documents.CHART_ORDER) chartOrder, documents.DATETIME dateTime, RTRIM(documents.MRN) mrn, RTRIM(documents.ENCOUNTER) encounter, RTRIM(documents.FACILITY) facility
FROM cabinet..ROI_Documents documents, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPatient WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestid and documents.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq and documents.ROI_Encounters_Seq is null

SELECT versions.ROI_Versions_Seq versionSeq, versions.ROI_Documents_Seq documentSeq,
RTRIM(versions.VersionNumber) versionNumber, RTRIM(versions.Doc_Id) docId
FROM cabinet..ROI_ENCOUNTERS encounters, cabinet..ROI_Documents documents, cabinet..ROI_VERSIONS versions, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPatient WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestid and encounters.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq and documents.ROI_Encounters_Seq = encounters.ROI_Encounters_Seq and versions.ROI_Documents_Seq = documents.ROI_Documents_Seq

SELECT versions.ROI_Versions_Seq versionSeq, versions.ROI_Documents_Seq documentSeq,
RTRIM(versions.VersionNumber) versionNumber, RTRIM(versions.Doc_Id) docId
FROM cabinet..ROI_Documents documents, cabinet..ROI_VERSIONS versions, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPatient WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestid and documents.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq and versions.ROI_Documents_Seq = documents.ROI_Documents_Seq and documents.ROI_Encounters_Seq is null

SELECT pages.ROI_Pages_Seq pageSeq, pages.ROI_Versions_Seq versionSeq,
RTRIM(pages.imnet) imnetId, RTRIM(pages.ContentCount) contentCount,
pages.SelectedForRelease selectedForRelease, pages.IsReleased released, RTRIM(pages.page) pageNumber, RTRIM(pages.PageNumberRequested) pageNumberRequested, CASE WHEN cabinet.imnet IS NULL OR pages.Deleted = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS deleted
FROM cabinet..ROI_ENCOUNTERS encounters JOIN cabinet..ROI_Documents documents ON documents.ROI_Encounters_Seq = encounters.ROI_Encounters_Seq JOIN cabinet..ROI_VERSIONS versions ON versions.ROI_Documents_Seq = documents.ROI_Documents_Seq JOIN cabinet..ROI_Pages pages ON pages.ROI_Versions_Seq = versions.ROI_Versions_Seq JOIN cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPatient ON encounters.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq JOIN cabinet..ROI_PATIENTS patient ON coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq = patient.ROI_Patients_Seq LEFT OUTER JOIN cabinet..Documents cabinet_doc ON cabinet_doc.DOC_ID = documents.DOC_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN cabinet..Versions cabinet_vers ON cabinet_vers.DOC_ID = versions.DOC_ID AND cabinet_vers.VersionNumber = versions.VersionNumber LEFT OUTER JOIN cabinet..CABINET_VERSION cabinet ON cabinet.mrn = patient.mrn AND cabinet.FACILITY = patient.FACILITY AND cabinet.ENCOUNTER = encounters.ENCOUNTER AND cabinet.version = cabinet_vers.VersionNumber AND cabinet.DUID = cabinet_doc.DUID AND cabinet.IMNET = pages.IMNET AND cabinet.DELETED = 'N' WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestid

SELECT pages.ROI_Pages_Seq pageSeq, pages.ROI_Versions_Seq versionSeq,
RTRIM(pages.imnet) imnetId, RTRIM(pages.ContentCount) contentCount,
pages.SelectedForRelease selectedForRelease, pages.IsReleased released, RTRIM(pages.page) pageNumber, RTRIM(pages.PageNumberRequested) pageNumberRequested, CASE WHEN cabinet.imnet IS NULL OR pages.Deleted = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS deleted
FROM cabinet..ROI_Documents documents JOIN cabinet..ROI_VERSIONS versions ON versions.ROI_Documents_Seq = documents.ROI_Documents_Seq JOIN cabinet..ROI_Pages pages ON pages.ROI_Versions_Seq = versions.ROI_Versions_Seq JOIN cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPatient ON documents.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq JOIN cabinet..ROI_PATIENTS patient ON coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq = patient.ROI_Patients_Seq LEFT OUTER JOIN cabinet..Documents cabinet_doc ON cabinet_doc.DOC_ID = documents.DOC_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN cabinet..Versions cabinet_vers ON cabinet_vers.DOC_ID = versions.DOC_ID AND cabinet_vers.VersionNumber = versions.VersionNumber LEFT OUTER JOIN cabinet..CABINET_VERSION cabinet ON cabinet.mrn = patient.mrn AND cabinet.FACILITY = patient.FACILITY AND cabinet.ENCOUNTER = '' AND cabinet.version = cabinet_vers.VersionNumber AND cabinet.DUID = cabinet_doc.DUID AND cabinet.IMNET = pages.IMNET AND cabinet.DELETED = 'N' WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestid and documents.ROI_Encounters_Seq is null
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_PAGES SET SelectedForRelease = ? WHERE ROI_Pages_Seq = ?
SELECT ROI_Encounters_Seq encounterSeq from cabinet..ROI_ENCOUNTERS WHERE ROI_Patients_Seq in ( :patientSeqList )
SELECT ROI_Documents_Seq documentSeq from cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS WHERE ROI_Patients_Seq in ( :patientSeqList ) AND ROI_Encounters_Seq is null
SELECT ROI_Documents_Seq documentSeq from cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS WHERE ROI_Encounters_Seq in ( :encounterSeqList )
SELECT ROI_Versions_Seq versionSeq FROM cabinet..ROI_Versions WHERE ROI_Documents_Seq in ( :documentSeqList )
SELECT ROI_Pages_Seq pageSeq FROM cabinet..ROI_Pages WHERE ROI_Versions_Seq in ( :versionSeqList )
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId AND ROI_Patients_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_PATIENTS WHERE ROI_Patients_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_ENCOUNTERS WHERE ROI_Encounters_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_DOCUMENTS WHERE ROI_Documents_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_Versions WHERE ROI_Versions_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE FROM cabinet..ROI_Pages WHERE ROI_Pages_Seq in ( :seqList )

(SELECT docCore.ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore_Seq documentCoreSeq, docCore.ROI_SupplementarityDocuments_Seq documentSeq, docCore.ROI_Patients_Seq patientSeq, 0 supplementalId, docCore.MRN mrn, docCore.FACILITY facility, docCore.DOCNAME docName, docCore.ENCOUNTER encounter, docCore.DOCFACILITY docFacility, docCore.DEPARTMENT department, docCore.SUBTITLE subtitle, docCore.PAGECOUNT pageCount, docCore.DATEOFSERVICE dateOfService, docCore.COMMENT comment, docCore.SelectedForRelease selectedForRelease, docCore.isreleased released, docCore.ROI_BillingTier_Seq billingTierId,
docCore.Created_Dt createdDt, docCore.Created_By_Seq createdBy, docCore.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, docCore.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy
FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore docCore, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPat WHERE coreToPat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId AND docCore.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPat.ROI_Patients_Seq) UNION
(SELECT docCore.ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore_Seq documentCoreSeq, docCore.ROI_SupplementalDocuments_Seq documentSeq, suppCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq patientSeq, suppCore.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq supplementalId, null mrn, (case when suppCore.FACILITY is not null then suppCore.FACILITY else suppCore.FreeFormFacility end) facility, docCore.DOCNAME docName, docCore.ENCOUNTER encounter, docCore.DOCFACILITY docFacility, docCore.DEPARTMENT department, docCore.SUBTITLE subtitle, docCore.PAGECOUNT pageCount, docCore.DATEOFSERVICE dateOfService, docCore.COMMENT comment, docCore.SelectedForRelease selectedForRelease, docCore.isreleased released, docCore.ROI_BillingTier_Seq billingTierId,
docCore.Created_Dt createdDt, docCore.Created_By_Seq createdBy, docCore.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, docCore.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy
FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore suppCore, cabinet..ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore docCore, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore coreToPatient WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId AND docCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = suppCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND coreToPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = suppCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq)

(SELECT attachCore.ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore_Seq attachmentCoreSeq, attachCore.ROI_SupplementarityAttachments_Seq attachmentSeq, attachCore.ROI_Patients_Seq patientSeq, 0 supplementalId, attachCore.MRN mrn, attachCore.FACILITY facility, attachCore.TYPE type, attachCore.ENCOUNTER encounter, attachCore.DOCFACILITY docFacility, attachCore.SUBTITLE subtitle, attachCore.PAGECOUNT pageCount, attachCore.ISDELETED isDeleted, attachCore.DATEOFSERVICE dateOfService, attachCore.ATTACHMENTDATE attachmentDate, attachCore.UUID uuid, attachCore.FILENAME filename, attachCore.VOLUME volume, attachCore.PATH path, attachCore.FILETYPE filetype, attachCore.FILEEXT fileext, attachCore.printable_flag printable, attachCore.SUBMITTEDBY submittedBy, attachCore.COMMENT comment, attachCore.SelectedForRelease selectedForRelease, attachCore.isreleased released, attachCore.ROI_BillingTier_Seq billingTierId,
attachCore.Created_Dt createdDt, attachCore.Created_By_Seq createdBy, attachCore.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, attachCore.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore attachCore, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPat WHERE coreToPat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId AND attachCore.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPat.ROI_Patients_Seq) UNION
(SELECT attachCore.ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore_Seq attachmentCoreSeq, attachCore.ROI_SupplementalAttachments_Seq attachmentSeq, supp.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq patientSeq, supp.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq supplementalId, null mrn, (case when supp.FACILITY is not null then supp.FACILITY else supp.FreeFormFacility end) facility, attachCore.TYPE type, attachCore.ENCOUNTER encounter, attachCore.DOCFACILITY docFacility, attachCore.SUBTITLE subtitle, attachCore.PAGECOUNT pageCount, attachCore.ISDELETED isDeleted, attachCore.DATEOFSERVICE dateOfService, attachCore.ATTACHMENTDATE attachmentDate, attachCore.UUID uuid, attachCore.FILENAME filename, attachCore.VOLUME volume, attachCore.PATH path, attachCore.FILETYPE filetype, attachCore.FILEEXT fileext, attachCore.printable_flag printable, attachCore.SUBMITTEDBY submittedBy, attachCore.COMMENT comment, attachCore.SelectedForRelease selectedForRelease, attachCore.isreleased released, attachCore.ROI_BillingTier_Seq billingTierId,
attachCore.Created_Dt createdDt, attachCore.Created_By_Seq createdBy, attachCore.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, attachCore.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy
FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore supp, cabinet..ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore attachCore, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore coreToPatient WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId AND attachCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = supp.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND coreToPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = supp.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq)
DELETE attachment FROM ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore attachment WHERE attachment.ROI_Patients_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE attachment FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore attachment WHERE attachment.ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE attachment FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore attachment WHERE attachment.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE attachment FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore attachment WHERE attachment.ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE attachment FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore attachment WHERE attachment.ROI_Patients_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE attachment FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore attachment WHERE attachment.ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE attachment FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore attachment WHERE attachment.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE attachment FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore attachment WHERE attachment.ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE invpatients FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients invpatients WHERE invpatients.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE invpatients FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients invpatients WHERE invpatients.ROI_Patients_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE patients FROM ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore patients WHERE patients.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq in ( :seqList )
DELETE patients FROM ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore patients WHERE patients.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq in ( :seqList )

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore ( ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq, MRN, Facility, FreeFormFacility, SSN, GENDER, EPN, dob, VIP, patientLocked, encounterLocked, FIRSTNAME, LASTNAME, ADDRESS1, ADDRESS2, ADDRESS3, CITY, STATE, ZIP, HOMEPHONE, WORKPHONE, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq) VALUES( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);

(SELECT coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, patient.ROI_Patients_Seq patientSeq, 0 supplementalId, invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq invoiceId, patient.MRN mrn, patient.Facility facility, patient.NAME name, patient.dob dob, patient.SEX gender,
patient.SSN ssn, patient.EPN epn, patient.VIP vip, patient.LOCKOUT patientLocked, 0 encounterLocked, 1 hpf,
null createdDt, 0 createdBy, null modifiedDt, 0 modifiedBy
FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients invoice, cabinet..ROI_Patients patient, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPatient WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq = invoice.ROI_Patients_Seq and patient.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq and invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in ( :invoiceIds))
UNION
(SELECT coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, supp.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq patientSeq, supp.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq supplementalId, invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq invoiceId, supp.MRN mrn, supp.Facility facility, (case when supp.LASTNAME IS NULL then '' else supp.LASTNAME end + case when supp.FIRSTNAME = '' then '' when supp.FIRSTNAME IS NULL then '' else ', ' + supp.FIRSTNAME end) name, supp.dob dob, supp.GENDER gender,
supp.SSN ssn, supp.EPN epn, supp.VIP vip, supp.patientLocked patientLocked, supp.encounterLocked encounterLocked, 0 hpf,
supp.Created_Dt createdDt, supp.Created_By_Seq createdBy, supp.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, supp.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy
FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients invoice, cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore supp, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore coreToPatient WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND supp.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in ( :invoiceIds))

SELECT 0 requestId, patient.ROI_Patients_Seq patientSeq, 0 supplementalId, patient.MRN mrn, patient.Facility facility, patient.NAME name, patient.dob dob, patient.SEX gender,
patient.SSN ssn, patient.EPN epn, patient.VIP vip, patient.LOCKOUT patientLocked, 0 encounterLocked, 1 hpf,
null createdDt, 0 createdBy, null modifiedDt, 0 modifiedBy FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients patient WHERE patient.ROI_Patients_Seq in (:hpfPatientList)
UNION
SELECT supp.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, supp.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq patientSeq, supp.ROI_SupplementalPatients_Seq supplementalId, supp.MRN mrn, supp.Facility facility, (case when supp.LASTNAME IS NULL then '' else supp.LASTNAME end + case when supp.FIRSTNAME = '' then '' when supp.FIRSTNAME IS NULL then '' else ', ' + supp.FIRSTNAME end) name, supp.dob dob, supp.GENDER gender,
supp.SSN ssn, supp.EPN epn, supp.VIP vip, supp.patientLocked patientLocked, supp.encounterLocked encounterLocked, 0 hpf,
supp.Created_Dt createdDt, supp.Created_By_Seq createdBy, supp.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, supp.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy FROM cabinet..ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore supp
WHERE supp.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq in (:nonHpfPatientList)

SELECT patient.MRN mrn, patient.Facility facility, patient.NAME patientName, patient.dob patientDOB, patient.SEX patientSex, encounter.ENCOUNTER encounter, encounter.DISCHARGED dischargeDate, muDocType.MU_DocType hpfMuDocumentType, page.SelectedForRelease selectedForRelease, 'HPF Documents' type
FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients patient, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPatient, cabinet..ROI_Encounters encounter, cabinet..ROI_Documents document, cabinet..ROI_Versions version, cabinet..ROI_Pages page, cabinet..ROI_DocType docType, cabinet..ROI_MU_DOCTYPE muDocType
WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and patient.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq and coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq = encounter.ROI_Patients_Seq and encounter.ROI_Encounters_Seq = document.ROI_Encounters_Seq and document.ROI_Documents_Seq = version.ROI_Documents_Seq and version.ROI_Versions_Seq = page.ROI_Versions_Seq and document.DOCTYPE_ID = docType.DOCTYPE_ID and docType.ROI_MU_DocType_Seq = muDocType.ROI_MU_DocType_Seq and docType.Type = :docType
UNION
SELECT patient.MRN mrn, patient.Facility facility, patient.NAME patientName, patient.dob patientDOB, patient.SEX patientSex, supp.ENCOUNTER encounter, null dischargeDate, 'Clinical Summary' hpfMuDocumentType, suppcore.SelectedForRelease selectedForRelease, supp.TYPE type
FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients patient, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPatient, cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore suppCore, cabinet..ROI_SupplementarityAttachments supp WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and patient.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq and coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq = suppCore.ROI_Patients_Seq and suppCore.ROI_SupplementarityAttachments_Seq = supp.ROI_SupplementarityAttachments_Seq

SELECT patient.ROI_Patients_Seq patientSeq
FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients patient, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients coreToPatient WHERE coreToPatient.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and patient.ROI_Patients_Seq = coreToPatient.ROI_Patients_Seq and patient.MRN = :mrn and patient.FACILITY = :facility

SELECT distinct ext.MRN mrn FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients patient, cabinet..ROI_EXT_SOURCE_DocumentCore ext WHERE patient.ROI_Patients_Seq in ( :patientId ) and ext.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId and patient.MRN = ext.MRN
